Log:
  New port: net/socketapi

  SocketAPI is the socket API library for the SCTPLIB user-space
  SCTP implementation.

  WWW: https://www.uni-due.de/~be0001/sctplib/

  Submitted by:	Thomas Dreibholz <dreibh@iem.uni-due.de>
